featured.signatureLatteDesc: Velvety espresso with house-made caramel syrup and silky steamed milk.
featured.matchaMistDesc: Ceremonial-grade matcha, oat milk, a touch of vanilla and raw honey.
featured.coldBrewFloatDesc: 18-hour cold brew over ice crowned with a scoop of vanilla bean gelato.
featured.butterCroissantDesc: Freshly baked, imported French-style pastry — flaky, golden, warm.
featured.mochaMadnessDesc: Double espresso, dark Belgian chocolate, and clouds of whipped cream.
featured.berrySmoothieDesc: Wild blueberry, strawberry, banana and coconut milk blended smooth.

heroCard1.name: Matcha Mist
heroCard1.desc: Ceremonial-grade matcha, oat milk, a touch of vanilla and raw honey.

heroCard2.name: Cold Brew Float
heroCard2.desc: 18-hour cold brew over ice crowned with a scoop of vanilla bean gelato.

heroCard3.name: Brown Sugar Oat Latte
heroCard3.desc: Hand-foamed oat milk, brown sugar syrup & caramel drizzle.

hero.subtext: From single-origin pour-overs to handcrafted lattes — we brew each cup with the same obsessive care that goes into sourcing our beans.

featuredMenu.heading: Crafted with
featuredMenu.subtext: Every item is made to order — no shortcuts, no compromises.

values.subtext: We believe great coffee changes your day. So we obsess over every detail.
values.sustainablySourcedDesc: Direct-trade relationships with farms across Ethiopia, Colombia, and Sumatra.
values.baristaCertifiedDesc: Every barista completes 80 hours of hands-on training before their first pour.
values.madeToOrderDesc: No batch brews. Every cup crafted fresh, just for you, every single time.
values.communityFirstDesc: 2% of every sale goes to local literacy and community kitchen programmes.

cta.heading: Ready to Order?
cta.subtext: Browse our full menu, customise your drink, and pick it up at the counter or have it brought to your table.

footer.tagline: Specialty coffee roasted with care, served with passion.

menu.heroSubtext: Handcrafted beverages & bites, made to order just for you.

product.defaultDescription: A handcrafted specialty from our baristas. Rich flavour, made to order just for you.
